reviews.review_description: Always been a fan of Les, but this game is absolutely horrible. Gameplay and inventory selection are much more difficult than normal controls for the same console, and you can't skip any of the gruesomely long introductions. If I had any way to refund this, I would, and I only spent $3 on it.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your honest review, it ain't easy making and publishing a VR game on a shoestring budget, kind of like survival in the wild I guess? A bit difficult.  Sorry you feel you are out 3 bucks. At least others have enjoyed it, and several have managed to play the experience top to tail without dying. The real survival challenge. :)

reviews.review_description:
This has some of the worst controls of any VR app I have used. You put the knife right in the slot on the belt and it falls to the floor. You throw a rock and it falls straight to the ground.

On top of that when you find ChapStick it says you can use it to help start a fire, but it is impossible to open the ChapStick. Don't buy this.

developer_response.body: We are sorry you’re having such difficulty with the controls. A couple of tips on the mechanics. An object will ray cast a line to the belt, when you see that line then you give it a beat to lock, then release the object and it should snap to the belt. The lip balm is good to go, no lid to remove, you simply apply it to the paper to help it burn,  hope that helps.

reviews.review_title: Les lost his respect since bigfoot show
reviews.review_description: This is a cheap cash grab. As someone certified in the skills presented here, it's incomplete, lazy, and low quality.

reviews.review_title: I want my money back now.
reviews.review_description: Don't ever even think about buying this game it's  short and overpriced
At some point you get lost in the snow and walk around endlessly. Please make navigating better. Make better guiding in the game please.
I’m sorry but this was so boring I don’t even know how it has as high of reviews as it does.
About 45 minutes, with no deaths! I like the alternate route through the caves (fall through the second ice field you come to) nice details. It is short, but replayable. Try to beat my time!

developer_response.body:
WOOOO! Congrats! I think 45-46 min is my record time but in development I played it over 1000 times. Love this! ❤️
(I deleted my score but you have inspired me put it back up on the board)

reviews.review_description: I bought this game because of the fact I was super bored of playing the same old games over and over again, when I bought it I was expecting it to be your typical survival game but no, I was the best game I’ve played in a while and constantly replay the game every day. This game is a 100% must buy!

developer_response.body: We love to hear this! Can you beat the game without dying? Very few can.

reviews.review_description: This game is really cool and fun but I do think it is a bit too short. Please either make the story longer or add a survival mode in an endless map with an option for single player or multiplayer

developer_response.body: Thanks! glad you enjoyed it! All great suggestion for the next one!

reviews.review_description:
I really enjoy survival games as i find it relaxing but this Wasn't what I thought it would be like.
 but nowhere near as fun as that was. 

I think this game has great potential in future updates but I feel it lacks a little bit. 

It does teach you basic survival in the situation. 

But can be so much more. Just felt like it was a tutorial then it was finished. 

If your interested in some of my ideas 
A game with what I have in mind will definitely attract more people all ages and you can still teach how to survive in the process. 

I'll definitely be interested in future updates 
I'll obviously change my rating as this progresses

developer_response.body:
Sorry you felt misled, but we appreciate your feedback. We actually hadn’t explored Stranded Deep before—so thanks for bringing it to our attention! It looks like an incredible game!   We’re checking it out now. Our budget, platforms, and development process were likely a little different, but it’s always great to learn from other survival experiences.

Thanks for making us aware of this game!

*addition.
Absolutely can you join our discord? We are in development of the next installment right now.

reviews.review_description: Adding extra star bc Les Stroud is cool but this game is terrible. Cant skip cut scene after death, walking is super slow. Its supposed to be linear story but it doesnt tell me where to go and walking anywhere takes forever.

developer_response.body: Thanks for the extra star. We are sorry you were frustrated with the game. Admittedly there are a couple of cut scenes you can’t skip on respawn, we had initially thought that was a good idea as you may have missed the instructions and died. That said it is a survival sim not an arcade game so Les and the developers went for authenticity, walking is slow in the snow, yes you can get lost if you don’t know how to use a compass. If you choose to try the experience again a handy tip other than, listening to Les’s  instructions carefully, is to check your watch’s  short list of your priorities.

reviews.review_description: Very short and a bit of a money grab with very little content, otherwise just ok , just not worth the money for how short it is.
T posing, trash cheaply thrown together with no care for the VR user. Rushed waste of time.
It could be a great game but it is too short. Really only has 4 ish levels and that is it. Waste of money

reviews.review_title: fan of the show- game is getting better!
reviews.review_description:
Update 4/17/24
Devs keep making this better- Obviously they are committed to realizing the potential of this game- WOW I am super impressed with the new updates- This game is totally worth the money now- Kudos, Developers!


Update- 12/19 - add a star because it’s a good patch… Developers are also very dedicated and communicate with everyone - they want people in their discord… I think the game is moving in the right direction and I think since I just saw it’s on sale. It’s probably a good time to buy it because they are definitely committed to making it better and have already made it better than it was when I brought the Review below. I realize now that a lot of the shortcomings are just minor in the bigger picture of the story,  and it is a good story -you do get a feeling of satisfaction when you make it to the end.


It definitely has its moments… But they are interspersed by a lot of tapping on the ice with a pole… They really could’ve made this a lot deeper and I think it was disappointing how they left it… Example/ you just kind of drop the firewood in the direction of the fire and it builds a campfire for you- here’s a hint… If you get stock, tap your watch because there’s a priority list and it really spells a lot of it out for you.

you’re just going on one prescribed path that les kind of guides you through every step so there’s no sense of freedom to explore and it’s pretty obvious. They didn’t develop the environment other than whatever the centerset piece is… And I’m on a quest three so it’s not a hardware limitation… . You just follow a specific path and there is an orange border if you move too far to the left or the right that kills you, and that’s the entire game.

Great concept to really learn some important things about survival from the man himself who does a great job by the way…  and there are a lot of really valuable survival tips that you wouldn’t hear in most games that make it kind of unique. I really enjoyed the bit in the second to last part where you’re paddling the canoe down the river… Here’s a hint in the steeper parts you want to backpaddle- so you stick the paddle on the inside of the turn in holding steady and it will flip the point around so you don’t run a ground.

You can tell it’s a VR game that was not made by  gamers- so it tells a good story, but it doesn’t really play like a video game as much as an interactive story . it’s got some Jankyness and collision issues- 

It’s a cool experience if you’re a fan of les- and in retrospect, it is fairly priced for what it is.

it might just be me- i felt the same way about peaky  blinders game- the celebrity connection made it cool for fans- from a fan perspective-but if you’re looking for a real survival game, this is not it… You’re better off with song in the smoke or Green hell- or hopefully maybe they’ll come out with a Quest version of the long dark sometime… But this is more like just a kind of tv show dlc .

It’s a good start though. I would buy DLC for this game. If it were different survival adventures - the developers are really committed to it so I think the issues they have in this game probably won’t be there the next time - I bet the second adventure is 10 times better and this one was pretty good anyway so I’m really looking forward to the next one. 
let’s see one in the rainforest next time.

developer_response.body: Hi IzzyDeadYet, we're so glad to hear this - you made our day! :)

reviews.review_title: It is a one and Done
reviews.review_description: The game is fun for a little bit do not get this game and it will not give me my money back and I play it for Less than two hours

developer_response.body: We are happy to hear you had some fun playing the game! :)  We do wish we could help you with your refund issue, but that is all up to the meta app store, unfortunately we have no control of that.

reviews.review_description:
Get your 25 off:

get25off.bio.link

Okay, so you find yourself in this situation, alone a top of a mountain... But do not fear,  Les Stroud will guide you to the beach.
The sounds are great, you can almost feel the snowy cold wind... You must think about twice, what should you do, and do it fast, unless you won't survive an hour...🥶🥶
I like the game, actually you can learn from the suggestion.

Was this helpful?
Hit the button, help the others too!👍

I have never had so much trouble with the controllers doing the wrong thing.
Only one will pick up , teleport barely works.
Won't let go of items, keeps picking up when I don't want to then it won't pick up.
Driving  me freakin nuts.
Wish I didn't waste my money on this one.
The survivorman is a great person and I hate giving such a low score but the mechanics of the game sucks.

developer_response.body:
Hi T.S.MAC, so sorry to hear about your troubles, this does not sound normal. Please reach out via Discord so we can try to troubleshoot your issues. https://discord.com/invite/4TcqKmQs7V
About the teleportation: it is true that you move only short distances at the very beginning. Once you've crafted your snowshoes, you go much faster.

reviews.review_description: What a great idea for title! I love survivor stuff. It’s wonderful to immerse yourself in the fantasy of testing your grit. Some helpful tips long way too. I won’t spoil anything, it is highly recommended.
I thoroughly enjoyed this game. I hope they have another one like it. I would love to play it as well. But this was definitely an awesome experience 👏

developer_response.body: Thanks so much! Super happy you enjoyed it, and YES we are indeed working on a follow up experience!  Stay tuned.
